ValidationRule.description: Blocks moving an Opportunity from Needs Analysis to Proposal/Price Quote unless at least one competitor has been linked via Opportunity_Competitor__c. Only gates that specific transition so reps are not blocked earlier in the pipeline.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal/Price Quote"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Needs Analysis"), Competitor_Count__c = 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please link at least one competitor before moving this opportunity to Proposal/Price Quote.
